channel.title: NC on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in NC on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 10GFEDSUPPLY, LLC — ICE MECKLENBURG, NC $704,997
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: 10GFEDSUPPLY, LLC Award ID: 70CMSW25FR0000069 Amount: $704,996.57 Description: THIS AWARD PROCURES VERTICAL STORAGE UNITS TO SUPPORT LAW ENFORCEMENT OPERATIONS FOR ICE- OFFICE OF FIREARMS AND TACTICAL PROGRAMS AT FORT BENNING, GA. Period: 2025-09-08 to 2026-01-14 Location: MECKLENBURG, NC (FIPS: 37119)

item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Cabarrus County Sheriff’s Office.

item.title: HENDRICK MOTORSPORTS LLC — ICE CABARRUS, NC $1,468,500
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: HENDRICK MOTORSPORTS LLC Award ID: 70CMSW25P00000055 Amount: $1,468,500.00 Description: THIS AWARD PROCURES CHEVROLET TAHOE VEHICLES ON BEHALF OF OFFICE OF ASSET AND FACILITIES MANAGEMENT. Period: 2025-08-15 to 2025-08-21 Location: CABARRUS, NC (FIPS: 37025)

item.title: LABORATORY CORPORATION OF AMERICA — ICE ALAMANCE, NC $3,377,163
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: LABORATORY CORPORATION OF AMERICA Award ID: 70CDCR24FC0000009 Amount: $3,377,163.48 Description: IHSC LABORATORY SERVICES Period: 2024-09-30 to 2025-09-29 Location: ALAMANCE, NC (FIPS: 37001)

item.title: LABORATORY CORPORATION OF AMERICA — ICE ALAMANCE, NC $3,870,012
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: LABORATORY CORPORATION OF AMERICA Award ID: 70CDCR22FC0000015 Amount: $3,870,012.03 Description: IHSC LABORATORY SERVICES Period: 2022-09-30 to 2023-09-29 Location: ALAMANCE, NC (FIPS: 37001)

item.title: LABORATORY CORPORATION OF AMERICA — ICE ALAMANCE, NC $4,756,549
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: LABORATORY CORPORATION OF AMERICA Award ID: 70CDCR22FC0000003 Amount: $4,756,549.09 Description: NEW LAB SERVICES CALL AND ADD $2,161,020.27. BPA #70CDCR21A00000002. POP 11/23/21-09/29/22. Period: 2021-11-23 to 2022-09-29 Location: ALAMANCE, NC (FIPS: 37001)

item.title: NET DIRECT SYSTEMS, LLC — ICE WAKE, NC $10,119,092
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: NET DIRECT SYSTEMS, LLC Award ID: HSCETE11J00058 Amount: $10,119,092.22 Description: COMPUTER REFRESH PROJECT; NEW BPA; AMB# 3382, AAP# 64836 ORIGINAL REQ# 192110CIOENG61517.1, 8/11/10. AWARD DELAYED BY PROTEST (FY10 FUNDS) Period: 2011-02-25 to 2013-09-21 Location: WAKE, NC (FIPS: 37183)

item.title: New Hanover Co Det Center — New Hanover, NC
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: New Hanover Co Det Center in New Hanover County, NC.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: QUANTICO TACTICAL INCORPORATED — ICE HOKE, NC $603,073
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: QUANTICO TACTICAL INCORPORATED Award ID: 70CMSW25FC0000029 Amount: $603,073.45 Description: PURCHASE OF LAW ENFORCEMENT EQUIPMENT (MFR RAIL ASSEMBLY, AIRBORNE CHARGING HANDLE, LOW PROFILE GAS BLOCK) FOR ISSUANCE TO LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENTS FOR THE OFFICE OF FIREARMS AND TACTICAL PROGRAMS (OFTP). Period: 2025-03-26 to 2025-09-24 Location: HOKE, NC (FIPS: 37093)

item.title: QUANTICO TACTICAL INCORPORATED — ICE HOKE, NC $763,047
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: QUANTICO TACTICAL INCORPORATED Award ID: 70CMSW26FR0000016 Amount: $763,047.45 Description: THIS DELIVERY ORDER AWARD PROVIDES 8" HANDGUARDS FOR AGENTS ISSUED SIG SAUER MPX DUTY WEAPONS TO SUPPORT ICE- OFFICE OF FIREARMS AND TACTICAL PROGRAMS. Period: 2026-02-20 to 2026-08-19 Location: HOKE, NC (FIPS: 37093)

item.title: QUANTICO TACTICAL INCORPORATED — ICE HOKE, NC $9,999,966
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: QUANTICO TACTICAL INCORPORATED Award ID: 70CMSW25FR0000151 Amount: $9,999,966.10 Description: THIS AWARD PROCURES FIREARMS AND MAGAZINES FOR IMMIGRATION AND CUSTOMS ENFORCEMENT, OFFICE OF FIREARMS AND TACTICAL PROGRAMS. Period: 2025-09-30 to 2026-04-20 Location: HOKE, NC (FIPS: 37093)

item.description:
